import pandas as pd
import requests
import string

DATA_URL = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/owid/covid-19-data/master/public/data/owid-covid-data.csv'

def get_covid_data():
    df = pd.read_csv(DATA_URL)
    df = clean_data(df)
    return df

def clean_data(df):
    df['continent'] = df['continent'].astype(str)
    df['location'] = df['location'].astype(str)
    df['iso_code'] = df['iso_code'].astype(str)
    df['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['date'])
    return df

def get_country_given_cases(cases):
    df = get_covid_data()
    df = df[df['total_cases'] > cases]
    countries = df['location'].tolist()
    countries = ''.join(countries)
    return countries

def display_country(country):
    print(f"The country with most cases is: {country}")

if __name__ == '__main__':
    num_cases = int(input("Enter number of cases: "))
    country = get_country_given_cases(num_cases)
    display_country(country)

def simulate_epidemic(population_size, infection_rate, recovery_rate):
    infected = np.zeros(population_size)
    infected[0] = 1

    healthy = np.ones(population_size) - infected
    recovered = np.zeros(population_size)

    transmission_matrix = np.random.negative_binomial(20, 0.5, (population_size, population_size))

    for i in range(population_size):
        infected[transmission_matrix[i] > 0] = 1

    for i in range(population_size):
        if infected[i]:
            infected[i] *= np.exp(-recovery_rate)


    return healthy, infected, recovered

import psutil

def get_cpu_usage():
    cpu_percent = psutil.cpu_percent()
    return cpu_percent

def get_virtual_mem():
    mem = psutil.virtual_memory()
    return mem

def get_disk_usage():
    disk = psutil.disk_usage('/')
    return disk[3]

    stats_dir = '/var/log/stats'
    os.makedirs(stats_dir, exist_ok=True)
    os.chmod(stats_dir, 0o777)
    cpu_file = os.path.join(stats_dir, 'cpu.txt')

def generate_ideas(prompt, ideas_file):

    tokenizer = GPT2Tokenizer.from_pretrained('gpt2')

from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

def get_flight_status(flight_number):
    url = f"https://www.flightstats.com/go/FlightStatus/flightStatusByFlight.do?&flightNumber={flight_number}"

    page = requests.get(url)
    soup = BeautifulSoup(page.content, 'html.parser')

    for row in status_rows:
        cells = row.find_all('td')
        time = cells[0].text.strip()
        airport = cells[1].text.strip()
        status = cells[2].text.strip()
        terminal = cells[3].text.strip()

        print(f"{time} - {airport} - {status} - {terminal}")

    async def get_flight_status(flight_number):
      loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
      status = await loop.run_in_executor(None, get_flight_status, flight_number)
      return status
